title: Xtra Pungent American Shrimp Skewers
description: Silky and pungent, these American shrimp skewers are a festive dish perfect for any occasion, featuring kosher salt and low-sodium friendly ingredients. The ice-bath-shock step ensures the shrimp stay tender and juicy.
instructions: Thread the shrimp onto skewers, leaving a small space between each shrimp.
Mix kosher salt, black pepper, garlic powder, onion powder, and paprika in a bowl.
Sprinkle the salt mixture evenly over the shrimp.
Brush the shrimp with lemon juice and olive oil.
Grill the shrimp for 2-3 minutes per side, or until they turn pink.
Immediately submerge the grilled shrimp in an ice bath to stop the cooking process.
Let the shrimp sit in the ice bath for 5 minutes before serving.
